title: Layer1 terminal int8 sigmoid PWL Nangate45 seed sweep

task.objective: Run the first real Layer1 Nangate45 OpenROAD sweep for the bounded terminal int8 sigmoid PWL seed so later Layer2 nonlinear activation evaluation can consume measured physical timing, power, and area instead of assumptions.
acceptance: The terminal_sigmoid_int8_pwl_wrapper metrics.csv contains at least one status=ok row for the queued sweep
Committed artifacts stay lightweight under runs/designs/activations/terminal_sigmoid_int8_pwl_wrapper/ plus runs/index.csv
The evaluated item records metrics_rows for the completed sigmoid seed

handoff.pr_title: eval: run Layer1 terminal int8 sigmoid PWL Nangate45 seed sweep
checklist: Commit only lightweight artifacts and regenerated runs/index.csv
Move this item from queued/ to evaluated/ and fill result
Include metrics row references for each completed sigmoid candidate
Run python3 scripts/build_runs_index.py and python3 scripts/validate_runs.py before pushing
